title: hieracium murorum subsp. spilophyllum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. spilophyllum, also known as Wall Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as urinary tract infections, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. spilophyllum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice, making it a versatile herbal remedy that can be used to promote overall well-being.
